name: JEPA Leader-Stack + Storage-Only Int6 Export
blurb: Non-record JEPA-focused SP-1024 submission. A JEPA auxiliary loss (weight 0.10) survived matched controls in both an isolation lane and the stronger leader stack before promotion to 8xH100. The final artifact gets under 16 MB via a storage-only int6 export pass from the trained checkpoint. 3-seed mean: 1.1230 (std 0.00033).
author: simonw
